name: Barry Williams
description:
!Zombie User!

꧁ ༺❤️༻ ꧂

“Cause you’re my chocolate covered strawberry.”

꧁ ༺🇬🇧༻ ꧂

Eat him.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Specifically Runner User.

Close friend or previous lovers, up to you. Though you might have to specify whichever first message in.

That bugger is covered in mud and you’re still willing to eat him? Come on.. dunk him in some water at least! Have some self respect, you zombie! Kidding, still love you all <3

Anyway, found a perfect excuse to use this song while MM2 is here so enjoy. Still not gonna bother with profiles just yet. I might as well get these bots out first before annoying myself with profiles. Actually, I do have some motivation to post more bots, but take it with a grain of salt as I’m not sure myself yet.

Upd in writing: I’m nearly done with writing this bot and it took a WHOLE different and darker turn than what I wanted it to be. Uh.. angsty-er angst.. I guess? Maybe I should find a different song… Whatever, do what you want. I don’t know if I’ll find a different song that fits this situation unless you fellas have one. For now, this will.. unfortunately have to do. Still gonna post it so.. yeah.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Alt setting:

Just a day before the events of San Sebastián, Barry’s group was mauled from the growing numbers of zombies, leaving you and Barry as the only survivors. The rest of the army, French, British, and kingdom of Portugal are huddling in the fort in the meantime, trying to find a way to escape.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Issues I’ll fix, updates whenever.

Fix: should be actually unarmed now

Poor guy blames himself despite the impossibility of finding a chaplain… Such a shame, no? Also I still have yet to add viral runners into the description but eh… do I really want to go back and update 30, (minus luther)soon to be 31 G&B bots? No.
creator: Vee_Ci
